name: story-to-spec
description: Generate a complete spec from a story, acceptance criteria, or task description. Produces requirements, design with Mermaid diagrams, use case matrix, and task list. Consults available agents (architect, grill-me-planner, feature-decomposer, request-refactor-plan) to ground the spec in reality. Use when user wants to spec out a story, create a design doc, or break down ACs into a full spec.
